subject: Invoice INV-2026-0007 – May 2026 Exchange Data, Connectivity & Co-location Services
preview: Attached is your EUR invoice for May exchange data feeds, market connectivity ports, and co-location services.
body:
Dear Accounts Payable Team,

Please find attached invoice #INV-2026-0007 for May 2026 market access and trading technology services under our EMEA master services agreement.

Invoice Currency: EUR
Subtotal: EUR 27,400.00
VAT (20%): EUR 5,480.00
Total Amount Due: EUR 32,880.00
Due Date: June 20, 2026
Payment Terms: Net 30

Please include the invoice number in your remittance reference. For billing questions, reply to this message and include your customer account number.

Kind regards,
ICE Data Services Europe Limited
Accounts Receivable (EMEA)
